closest_dz_rule: true_world_dz reported only when Euclidean closest_range_m <= 2.5; closest_range_m always reported
param_integrity_rule: T2/T2a require commit.speed_mps=1.8, commit.vz_cap_mps=1.2, terminal.enable=false; T2a additionally safety.imu_stale_s=0.25
scope: replay/CSV only; no simulator launch; SIM lock ignored by instruction for read-only parsing
